_comment: Held-out evaluation set for the AI rephrasing feature (PRD 9a/9C). These are synthetic USMLE Step 1-style Q/A pairs authored for evaluation only. They are NOT drawn from the study deck and are NOT used to train or fine-tune anything (we call a frozen OpenAI model), so there is no training corpus to leak into. rephrase_leakage_check.py confirms these fixtures are disjoint from the deck.

items.question: What enzyme is deficient in classic phenylketonuria?
Which vitamin deficiency causes Wernicke encephalopathy?
What is the most common cause of bacterial meningitis in neonates?
Which antibody is most specific for systemic lupus erythematosus?
What ion channel is defective in cystic fibrosis?
Which neurotransmitter is decreased in Parkinson disease?
What is the inheritance pattern of Duchenne muscular dystrophy?
Which cytokine is the main mediator of septic shock?
What is the rate-limiting enzyme of cholesterol synthesis?
Which cranial nerve is responsible for the efferent limb of the corneal reflex?
What is the most common primary malignant tumor of bone in young patients?
Which electrolyte abnormality causes peaked T waves on ECG?
What organism is associated with rice-water stool diarrhea?
Which clotting factor is deficient in hemophilia B?
What is the first-line treatment for acute anaphylaxis?
